spec_match.rationale: Exceptional coverage of complex edge cases. Illustrates that interrupted scroll animations resolve (rather than reject) after settling.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive double panels showing programmatic interruptions versus manual swipe/mousewheel gestures live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Fully matches the parent index description.

edge_cases.rationale: The appendLog function interpolates system strings into innerHTML on line 165. While not immediately vulnerable since the parameters are programmatically generated standard scroll values and API errors, migrating to textContent or safe template creation would be cleaner.

references.rationale: Successfully references the tracking ChromeStatus entry under see also links.

design_system.rationale: Superb grid styling, distinct panels, colorized border statuses, and monospace logs.

openQuestions.title: Refactor appendLog innerHTML logic
openQuestions.detail: Update the appendLog function (line 165) to build safe DOM nodes using document.createElement or textContent, preventing raw innerHTML assignments.
